shellCommands.command:
mkdir -p vectorops/src/vectorops && cat > vectorops/src/vectorops/__init__.py <<'PY'
from .core import dotproduct

__all__ = ["dotproduct"]
PY
cat > vectorops/src/vectorops/core.py <<'PY'
def dotproduct(a, b):
    return sum(x * y for x, y in zip(a, b))
PY
cat > vectorops/pyproject.toml <<'TOML'
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "vectorops"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Simple vector operations"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"
authors = [{name = "Bub"}]

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "src"}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
TOML
cat > vectorops/README.md <<'MD'
# vectorops

Simple vector operations package.
MD
cd vectorops && python3 -m build

python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/testenv && /home/user/workspace/testenv/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /home/user/workspace/testenv/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))"
curl -sSf http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ && echo && curl -sSf http://localhost:8080/packages/ | head
